title: Sum of Nodes with Even-Valued Grandparent
titleCn: 祖父节点值为偶数的节点和

testcases.input: root = [6,7,8,2,7,1,3,9,null,1,4,null,null,null,5] Output: 18 Explanation: The red nodes are the nodes with even-value grandparent while the blue nodes are the even-value grandparents.
testcases.expectedOutput: 18 Explanation: The red nodes are the nodes with even-value grandparent while the blue nodes are the even-value grandparents.
